AR1.justification: Routed correctly with explicit rationale: today's daybook for the cold-pickup Log and guardrail restate, followups.md edited for the stale legal review, and decisions.md deferred until/unless the user overrides — matching the strict bar that decisions.md records forward commitments, not adherence to existing ones.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; AR2 is n/a per rubric.

AR3.justification: All cross-references are relative (AGENTS.md, followups.md, decisions.md, observations.md, daybook/2026-04-21.md, daybook/AGENTS.md, tmp/) and resolve against the seed.

AR4.justification: New dated daybook file plus an in-line edit to the existing followup row (status, expected-by, notes) — followups.md is the one file the methodology permits non-append mutation on, so the edit is within the lifecycle; re-run would idempotently land on the same shape.
